ideation: This animation sequence simulates the action of putting on a t-shirt.  The movement will be exaggerated for clarity. Frame 1 shows both arms extended slightly forward and downward, palms facing upward, as if reaching for the shirt. Frame 2 shows the left arm reaching upward and slightly to the right, as if lifting and positioning the t-shirt. The right arm is slightly lower, palms facing upward, as if ready to support the shirt. Frame 3 shows both arms moving downward, as if pulling the t-shirt over the head. Frame 4 shows both arms lowered to the sides, palms facing inward, as if the t-shirt is now on. Frame 5 shows both arms relaxed at the sides.

frames.beat: arms reach forward, palms up, ready for the shirt
left arm lifts the shirt, right arm waits below
both arms pull the shirt down over the head
arms lower, shirt is now on
arms rest at sides, t-shirt is on
